value.response: {"scan":{"run_id":"LSR-001-2026-06-12","result":"alerts_found","alerts":[{"id":"ALERT-H03-CMC410","confidence":"medium","source_headlines":["H03"],"latent_edge_hypothesis":"Drought in Gujarat could tighten castor-related agricultural exports, which may reduce availability or extend lead times for castor-derived polyol used in the conformal barrier resin for CMC-410, creating supply pressure against current open demand.","real_world_prior":"Gujarat is a major hub for castor cultivation and castor-oil-linked export chains. Weather stress in that region can propagate into downstream specialty chemical availability, including castor-derived industrial inputs.","enterprise_path":["H03 reports deepening drought across parts of Gujarat and pressure on agricultural export markets.","Aster Vale's CMC-410 BOM includes component CR-88 conformal barrier resin.","CR-88 requires input castor_derived_polyol.","Supplier SUP-ARBCHEM is the recorded source for castor_derived_polyol / CR-88.","CMC-410 has only 80 units available in inventory versus open strategic order SO-7731 for 420 units.","Any incremental delay or shortage in this input could worsen an already constrained fulfillment position for CMC-410."],"business_exposure":{"revenue_at_risk":4200000,"affected_orders":["SO-7731"],"affected_customers":["Atlantic Energy"],"constrained_inventory":true},"reasoning":"Observed facts: H03 flags drought pressure in Gujarat agricultural export markets. Company records show CMC-410 depends on CR-88, which in turn uses castor_derived_polyol, supplied by ArborChem. Inventory shows 80 CMC-410 units available, while open strategic order SO-7731 requires 420 units. Hypothesis: if Gujarat drought disrupts castor-linked feedstock availability, ArborChem could face tighter supply or longer replenishment on castor-derived polyol, slowing CR-88 availability and increasing risk to CMC-410 fulfillment. Because current inventory is already below open demand, even a latent upstream disruption could translate into business exposure quickly.","citations":{"headlines":["events/headline-pack.md#H03"],"records":["records/bom.yaml#CMC-410->CR-88","records/suppliers.yaml#SUP-ARBCHEM","records/inventory.yaml#CMC-410","records/orders.yaml#SO-7731","records/company-profile.md"]},"uncertainty":["The records do not state ArborChem's own upstream sourcing geography for castor-derived polyol.","The headline describes pressure on agricultural export markets broadly, not a confirmed castor export disruption specifically.","No current supplier notice confirms an actual shortage or lead-time extension for CR-88 or castor-derived polyol."]}],"no_alert_rationale":null}}
